title: koanophyllon atroglandulosum
intro: Koanophyllon atroglandulosum, also known as yellow-flowered Koanophyllon, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Koanophyllon atroglandulosum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive problems, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers are dried and used in various forms to make medicinal remedies.
